title: FDA approves Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill, opening the next phase of the weight loss drug market
summary_full: The FDA approval of Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill Foundayo comes nearly three months after Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy hit the market.
summary_public: The FDA approval of Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill Foundayo comes nearly three months after Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy hit the market.
